# signature

**Object**

The key-value pairs that ad networks use to cryptographically sign a web ad.

## Declaration

```swift
object signature
```

## Discussion

Use the required parameters in the [doc://com.apple.skadnetworkforwebads/documentation/SKAdNetworkforWebAds/signature] object to generate a cryptographic signature for the [doc://com.apple.skadnetworkforwebads/documentation/SKAdNetworkforWebAds/AdImpressionResponse]. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.skadnetworkforwebads/documentation/SKAdNetworkforWebAds/generating-a-signature-for-attributable-web-ads].

## Providing the web ad signature and response

- **Generating a signature for attributable web ads**: Initiate install-validation by providing the signed parameters for an attributable web ad.
- **AdImpressionResponse**: The response you provide that contains a signed payload for a clicked web ad.
